1: # frozen_string_literal: true
2: 
3: class ActivityPub::Activity::Delete < ActivityPub::Activity
4:   def perform
5:     return delete_person if @account.uri == object_uri
6:     return delete_feature_authorization! unless feature_authorization_from_object.nil?
7: 
8:     delete_object
9:   end
10: 
11:   private
12: 
13:   def delete_person
14:     with_redis_lock("delete_in_progress:#{@account.id}", autorelease: 2.hours, raise_on_failure: false) do
15:       DeleteAccountService.new.call(@account, reserve_username: false, skip_activitypub: true)
16:     end
17:   end
18: 
19:   def delete_object
20:     return if object_uri.nil?
21: 
22:     with_redis_lock("delete_status_in_progress:#{object_uri}", raise_on_failure: false) do
23:       unless non_matching_uri_hosts?(@account.uri, object_uri)
24:         # This lock ensures a concurrent `ActivityPub::Activity::Create` either
25:         # does not create a status at all, or has finished saving it to the
26:         # database before we try to load it.
27:         # Without the lock, `delete_later!` could be called after `delete_arrived_first?`
28:         # and `Status.find` before `Status.create!`
29:         with_redis_lock("create:#{object_uri}") { delete_later!(object_uri) }
30: 
31:         Tombstone.find_or_create_by(uri: object_uri, account: @account)
32:       end
33: 
34:       case @object['type']
35:       when 'QuoteAuthorization'
36:         revoke_quote
37:       when 'Note', 'Question'
38:         delete_status
39:       else
40:         delete_status || revoke_quote
41:       end
42:     end
43:   end
44: 
45:   def delete_status
46:     @status   = Status.find_by(uri: object_uri, account: @account)
47:     @status ||= Status.find_by(uri: @object['atomUri'], account: @account) if @object.is_a?(Hash) && @object['atomUri'].present?
48: 
49:     return if @status.nil?
50: 
51:     forwarder.forward! if forwarder.forwardable?
52:     RemoveStatusService.new.call(@status, redraft: false)
53: 
54:     true
55:   end
56: 
57:   def revoke_quote
58:     @quote = Quote.find_by(approval_uri: object_uri, quoted_account: @account, state: [:pending, :accepted])
59:     return if @quote.nil?
60: 
61:     ActivityPub::Forwarder.new(@account, @json, @quote.status).forward! if @quote.status.present?
62: 
63:     @quote.reject!
64: 
65:     DistributionWorker.perform_async(@quote.status_id, { 'update' => true }) if @quote.status.present?
66:   end
67: 
68:   def delete_feature_authorization!
69:     collection_item = feature_authorization_from_object
70:     DeleteCollectionItemService.new.call(collection_item, revoke: true)
71:   end
72: 
73:   def forwarder
74:     @forwarder ||= ActivityPub::Forwarder.new(@account, @json, @status)
75:   end
76: 
77:   def feature_authorization_from_object
78:     return @collection_item if instance_variable_defined?(:@collection_item)
79: 
80:     @collection_item = CollectionItem.local.find_by(approval_uri: value_or_id(@object), account_id: @account.id)
81:   end
82: end

(End of file - total 82 lines)

1: # frozen_string_literal: true
2: 
3: class ActivityPub::Activity::Announce < ActivityPub::Activity
4:   def perform
5:     return reject_payload! if delete_arrived_first?(@json['id']) || !related_to_local_activity?
6:     return reject_payload! if @object.nil?
7: 
8:     with_redis_lock("announce:#{value_or_id(@object)}") do
9:       original_status = status_from_object
10: 
11:       return reject_payload! if original_status.nil? || !announceable?(original_status)
12:       return if requested_through_relay?
13: 
14:       @status = Status.find_by(account: @account, reblog: original_status)
15: 
16:       return @status unless @status.nil?
17: 
18:       @status = Status.create!(
19:         account: @account,
20:         reblog: original_status,
21:         uri: @json['id'],
22:         created_at: @json['published'],
23:         override_timestamps: @options[:override_timestamps],
24:         visibility: visibility_from_audience
25:       )
26: 
27:       Trends.register!(@status)
28: 
29:       distribute
30:     end
31: 
32:     @status
33:   end
34: 
35:   private
36: 
37:   def distribute
38:     # Notify the author of the original status if that status is local
39:     LocalNotificationWorker.perform_async(@status.reblog.account_id, @status.id, 'Status', 'reblog') if reblog_of_local_account?(@status) && !reblog_by_following_group_account?(@status)
40: 
41:     # Distribute into home and list feeds
42:     ::DistributionWorker.perform_async(@status.id) if @options[:override_timestamps] || @status.within_realtime_window?
43:   end
44: 
45:   def reblog_of_local_account?(status)
46:     status.reblog? && status.reblog.account.local?
47:   end
48: 
49:   def reblog_by_following_group_account?(status)
50:     status.reblog? && status.account.group? && status.reblog.account.following?(status.account)
51:   end
52: 
53:   def audience_to
54:     as_array(@json['to']).map { |x| value_or_id(x) }
55:   end
56: 
57:   def audience_cc
58:     as_array(@json['cc']).map { |x| value_or_id(x) }
59:   end
60: 
61:   def visibility_from_audience
62:     if audience_to.any? { |to| ActivityPub::TagManager.instance.public_collection?(to) }
63:       :public
64:     elsif audience_cc.any? { |cc| ActivityPub::TagManager.instance.public_collection?(cc) }
65:       :unlisted
66:     elsif audience_to.include?(@account.followers_url)
67:       :private
68:     else
69:       :direct
70:     end
71:   end
72: 
73:   def announceable?(status)
74:     status.account_id == @account.id || status.distributable?
75:   end
76: 
77:   def related_to_local_activity?
78:     followed_by_local_accounts? || requested_through_relay? || reblog_of_local_status?
79:   end
80: 
81:   def requested_through_relay?
82:     super || Relay.find_by(inbox_url: @account.inbox_url)&.enabled?
83:   end
84: 
85:   def reblog_of_local_status?
86:     status_from_uri(object_uri)&.account&.local?
87:   end
88: end

(End of file - total 88 lines)
</content>

1: # frozen_string_literal: true
2: 
3: class ActivityPub::Activity::Undo < ActivityPub::Activity
4:   def perform
5:     case @object['type']
6:     when 'Announce'
7:       undo_announce
8:     when 'Accept'
9:       undo_accept
10:     when 'Follow'
11:       undo_follow
12:     when 'Like'
13:       undo_like
14:     when 'Block'
15:       undo_block
16:     when nil
17:       handle_reference
18:     end
19:   end
20: 
21:   private
22: 
23:   def handle_reference
24:     # Some implementations do not inline the object, and as we don't have a
25:     # global index, we have to guess what object it is.
26:     return if object_uri.nil?
27: 
28:     try_undo_announce || try_undo_accept || try_undo_follow || try_undo_like || try_undo_block || delete_later!(object_uri)
29:   end
30: 
31:   def try_undo_announce
32:     status = Status.where.not(reblog_of_id: nil).find_by(uri: object_uri, account: @account)
33:     if status.present?
34:       RemoveStatusService.new.call(status)
35:       true
36:     else
37:       false
38:     end
39:   end
40: 
41:   def try_undo_accept
42:     # We can't currently handle `Undo Accept` as we don't record `Accept`'s uri
43:     false
44:   end
45: 
46:   def try_undo_follow
47:     follow = @account.follow_requests.find_by(uri: object_uri) || @account.active_relationships.find_by(uri: object_uri)
48: 
49:     if follow.present?
50:       follow.destroy
51:       true
52:     else
53:       false
54:     end
55:   end
56: 
57:   def try_undo_like
58:     # There is an index on accounts, but an account may have *many* favs, so this may be too costly
59:     false
60:   end
61: 
62:   def try_undo_block
63:     block = @account.block_relationships.find_by(uri: object_uri)
64:     if block.present?
65:       UnblockService.new.call(@account, block.target_account)
66:       true
67:     else
68:       false
69:     end
70:   end
71: 
72:   def undo_announce
73:     return if object_uri.nil?
74: 
75:     status   = Status.find_by(uri: object_uri, account: @account)
76:     status ||= Status.find_by(uri: @object['atomUri'], account: @account) if @object.is_a?(Hash) && @object['atomUri'].present?
77: 
78:     if status.nil?
79:       delete_later!(object_uri)
80:     else
81:       RemoveStatusService.new.call(status)
82:     end
83:   end
84: 
85:   def undo_accept
86:     ::Follow.find_by(target_account: @account, uri: target_uri)&.revoke_request!
87:   end
88: 
89:   def undo_follow
90:     target_account = account_from_uri(target_uri)
91: 
92:     return if target_account.nil? || !target_account.local?
93: 
94:     if @account.following?(target_account)
95:       @account.unfollow!(target_account)
96:     elsif @account.requested?(target_account)
97:       FollowRequest.find_by(account: @account, target_account: target_account)&.destroy
98:     else
99:       delete_later!(object_uri)
100:     end
101:   end
102: 
103:   def undo_like
104:     status = status_from_uri(target_uri)
105: 
106:     return if status.nil? || !status.account.local?
107: 
108:     if @account.favourited?(status)
109:       favourite = status.favourites.where(account: @account).first
110:       favourite&.destroy
111:     else
112:       delete_later!(object_uri)
113:     end
114:   end
115: 
116:   def undo_block
117:     target_account = account_from_uri(target_uri)
118: 
119:     return if target_account.nil? || !target_account.local?
120: 
121:     if @account.blocking?(target_account)
122:       UnblockService.new.call(@account, target_account)
123:     else
124:       delete_later!(object_uri)
125:     end
126:   end
127: 
128:   def target_uri
129:     @target_uri ||= value_or_id(@object['object'])
130:   end
131: end

1: # frozen_string_literal: true
2: 
3: class ActivityPub::Activity::Update < ActivityPub::Activity
4:   # Updates to unknown objects older than that are ignored
5:   OBJECT_AGE_THRESHOLD = 1.day
6: 
7:   def perform
8:     @account.schedule_refresh_if_stale!
9: 
10:     dereference_object!
11: 
12:     if equals_or_includes_any?(@object['type'], %w(Application Group Organization Person Service))
13:       update_account
14:     elsif supported_object_type? || converted_object_type?
15:       update_status
16:     elsif equals_or_includes_any?(@object['type'], ['FeaturedCollection'])
17:       update_collection
18:     end
19:   end
20: 
21:   private
22: 
23:   def update_account
24:     return reject_payload! if @account.uri != object_uri
25: 
26:     ActivityPub::ProcessAccountService.new.call(@account.username, @account.domain, @object, signed_with_known_key: true, request_id: @options[:request_id])
27:   end
28: 
29:   def update_status
30:     return reject_payload! if non_matching_uri_hosts?(@account.uri, object_uri)
31: 
32:     @status = Status.find_by(uri: object_uri, account_id: @account.id)
33: 
34:     # Ignore updates for old unknown objects, since those are updates we are not interested in
35:     # Also ignore unknown objects from suspended users for the same reasons
36:     return if @status.nil? && (@account.suspended? || object_too_old?)
37: 
38:     # We may be getting `Create` and `Update` out of order
39:     @status ||= ActivityPub::Activity::Create.new(@json, @account, **@options).perform
40: 
41:     return if @status.nil?
42: 
43:     ActivityPub::ProcessStatusUpdateService.new.call(@status, @json, @object, request_id: @options[:request_id])
44:   end
45: 
46:   def update_collection
47:     return reject_payload! if non_matching_uri_hosts?(@account.uri, object_uri)
48: 
49:     ActivityPub::ProcessFeaturedCollectionService.new.call(@account, @object)
50:   end
51: 
52:   def object_too_old?
53:     @object['published'].present? && @object['published'].to_datetime < OBJECT_AGE_THRESHOLD.ago
54:   rescue Date::Error
55:     false
56:   end
57: end

1: # frozen_string_literal: true
2: 
3: class ActivityPub::Activity::Flag < ActivityPub::Activity
4:   COMMENT_SIZE_LIMIT = 5000
5: 
6:   def perform
7:     return if skip_reports?
8: 
9:     target_accounts            = object_uris.filter_map { |uri| account_from_uri(uri) }
10:     target_statuses_by_account = object_uris.filter_map { |uri| status_from_uri(uri) }.group_by(&:account_id)
11:     target_collections_by_account = object_uris.filter_map { |uri| collection_from_uri(uri) }.group_by(&:account_id)
12: 
13:     target_accounts.each do |target_account|
14:       target_statuses     = target_statuses_by_account[target_account.id]
15:       target_collections  = target_collections_by_account.fetch(target_account.id, [])
16:       replied_to_accounts = target_statuses.nil? ? [] : Account.local.where(id: target_statuses.filter_map(&:in_reply_to_account_id))
17: 
18:       next if target_account.suspended? || (!target_account.local? && replied_to_accounts.none?)
19: 
20:       ReportService.new.call(
21:         @account,
22:         target_account,
23:         status_ids: target_statuses.nil? ? [] : target_statuses.map(&:id),
24:         collection_ids: target_collections.map(&:id),
25:         comment: report_comment,
26:         uri: report_uri
27:       )
28:     end
29:   end
30: 
31:   private
32: 
33:   def skip_reports?
34:     DomainBlock.reject_reports?(@account.domain)
35:   end
36: 
37:   def object_uris
38:     @object_uris ||= Array(@object.is_a?(Array) ? @object.map { |item| value_or_id(item) } : value_or_id(@object))
39:   end
40: 
41:   def report_uri
42:     @json['id'] unless @json['id'].nil? || non_matching_uri_hosts?(@account.uri, @json['id'])
43:   end
44: 
45:   def report_comment
46:     (@json['content'] || '')[0...COMMENT_SIZE_LIMIT]
47:   end
48: end

1: # frozen_string_literal: true
2: 
3: class ActivityPub::Activity::QuoteRequest < ActivityPub::Activity
4:   include Payloadable
5: 
6:   def perform
7:     return if non_matching_uri_hosts?(@account.uri, @json['id'])
8: 
9:     quoted_status = status_from_uri(object_uri)
10:     return if quoted_status.nil? || !quoted_status.account.local? || !quoted_status.distributable? || quoted_status.reblog?
11: 
12:     if StatusPolicy.new(@account, quoted_status).quote?
13:       accept_quote_request!(quoted_status)
14:     else
15:       reject_quote_request!(quoted_status)
16:     end
17:   end
18: 
19:   private
20: 
21:   def accept_quote_request!(quoted_status)
22:     status = status_from_uri(instrument_uri)
23:     status ||= import_instrument(quoted_status)
24:     status ||= ActivityPub::FetchRemoteStatusService.new.call(instrument_uri, on_behalf_of: quoted_status.account, request_id: @options[:request_id])
25:     # TODO: raise if status is nil
26: 
27:     # Sanity check
28:     return unless status.quote.quoted_status == quoted_status && status.account == @account
29: 
30:     status.quote.ensure_quoted_access
31:     status.quote.update!(activity_uri: @json['id'])
32:     status.quote.accept!
33: 
34:     json = serialize_payload(status.quote, ActivityPub::AcceptQuoteRequestSerializer).to_json
35:     ActivityPub::DeliveryWorker.perform_async(json, quoted_status.account_id, @account.inbox_url)
36: 
37:     # Ensure the user is notified
38:     LocalNotificationWorker.perform_async(quoted_status.account_id, status.quote.id, 'Quote', 'quote')
39: 
40:     # Ensure local followers get to see the post updated with approval
41:     DistributionWorker.perform_async(status.id, { 'update' => true, 'skip_notifications' => true })
42:   end
43: 
44:   def import_instrument(quoted_status)
45:     return unless @json['instrument'].is_a?(Hash)
46: 
47:     # NOTE: Replacing the object's context by that of the parent activity is
48:     # not sound, but it's consistent with the rest of the codebase
49:     instrument = @json['instrument'].merge({ '@context' => @json['@context'] })
50:     return if non_matching_uri_hosts?(@account.uri, instrument['id'])
51: 
52:     ActivityPub::FetchRemoteStatusService.new.call(instrument['id'], prefetched_body: instrument, on_behalf_of: quoted_status.account, request_id: @options[:request_id])
53:   end
54: 
55:   def reject_quote_request!(quoted_status)
56:     quote = Quote.new(
57:       quoted_status: quoted_status,
58:       quoted_account: quoted_status.account,
59:       status: Status.new(account: @account, uri: instrument_uri),
60:       account: @account,
61:       activity_uri: @json['id']
62:     )
63:     json = serialize_payload(quote, ActivityPub::RejectQuoteRequestSerializer).to_json
64:     ActivityPub::DeliveryWorker.perform_async(json, quoted_status.account_id, @account.inbox_url)
65:   end
66: 
67:   def instrument_uri
68:     value_or_id(@json['instrument'])
69:   end
70: end

1: # frozen_string_literal: true
2: 
3: class ResolveURLService < BaseService
4:   include JsonLdHelper
5:   include Authorization
6: 
7:   USERNAME_STATUS_RE = %r{/@(?<username>#{Account::USERNAME_RE})/(statuses/)?(?<status_id>[0-9a-zA-Z]+)\Z}
8: 
9:   def call(url, on_behalf_of: nil)
10:     @url          = url
11:     @on_behalf_of = on_behalf_of
12: 
13:     if local_url?
14:       process_local_url
15:     elsif !fetched_resource.nil?
16:       process_url
17:     else
18:       process_url_from_db
19:     end
20:   end
21: 
22:   private
23: 
24:   def process_url
25:     if equals_or_includes_any?(type, ActivityPub::FetchRemoteActorService::SUPPORTED_TYPES)
26:       ActivityPub::FetchRemoteActorService.new.call(resource_url, prefetched_body: body)
27:     elsif equals_or_includes_any?(type, ActivityPub::Activity::Create::SUPPORTED_TYPES + ActivityPub::Activity::Create::CONVERTED_TYPES)
28:       status = FetchRemoteStatusService.new.call(resource_url, prefetched_body: body)
29:       authorize_with @on_behalf_of, status, :show? unless status.nil?
30:       status
31:     elsif type == 'FeaturedCollection'
32:       collection = ActivityPub::FetchRemoteFeaturedCollectionService.new.call(resource_url, prefetched_body: body)
33:       authorize_with @on_behalf_of, collection, :show? unless collection.nil?
34:       collection
35:     end
36:   end
37: 
38:   def process_url_from_db
39:     if [500, 502, 503, 504, nil].include?(fetch_resource_service.response_code)
40:       account = Account.find_by(uri: @url)
41:       return account unless account.nil?
42:     end
43: 
44:     return unless @on_behalf_of.present? && [401, 403, 404].include?(fetch_resource_service.response_code)
45: 
46:     # It may happen that the resource is a private toot, and thus not fetchable,
47:     # but we can return the toot if we already know about it.
48:     scope = Status.where(uri: @url)
49: 
50:     # We don't have an index on `url`, so try guessing the `uri` from `url`
51:     parsed_url = Addressable::URI.parse(@url)
52:     parsed_url.path.match(USERNAME_STATUS_RE) do |matched|
53:       parsed_url.path = "/users/#{matched[:username]}/statuses/#{matched[:status_id]}"
54:       scope = scope.or(Status.where(uri: parsed_url.to_s, url: @url))
55:     end
56: 
57:     status = scope.first
58: 
59:     authorize_with @on_behalf_of, status, :show? unless status.nil?
60:     status
61:   rescue Mastodon::NotPermittedError
62:     nil
63:   end
64: 
65:   def fetched_resource
66:     @fetched_resource ||= fetch_resource_service.call(@url)
67:   end
68: 
69:   def fetch_resource_service
70:     @fetch_resource_service ||= FetchResourceService.new
71:   end
72: 
73:   def resource_url
74:     fetched_resource.first
75:   end
76: 
77:   def body
78:     fetched_resource.second[:prefetched_body]
79:   end
80: 
81:   def type
82:     json_data['type']
83:   end
84: 
85:   def json_data
86:     @json_data ||= body_to_json(body)
87:   end
88: 
89:   def local_url?
90:     TagManager.instance.local_url?(@url)
91:   end
92: 
93:   def process_local_url
94:     recognized_params = Rails.application.routes.recognize_path(@url)
95: 
96:     case recognized_params[:controller]
97:     when 'statuses'
98:       return unless recognized_params[:action] == 'show'
99: 
100:       status = Status.find_by(id: recognized_params[:id])
101:       check_local_status(status)
102:     when 'accounts'
103:       return unless recognized_params[:action] == 'show'
104: 
105:       Account.find_local(recognized_params[:username])
106:     when 'home'
107:       return unless recognized_params[:action] == 'index' && recognized_params[:username_with_domain].present?
108: 
109:       if recognized_params[:any]&.match?(/\A[0-9]+\Z/)
110:         status = Status.find_by(id: recognized_params[:any])
111:         check_local_status(status)
112:       elsif recognized_params[:any].blank?
113:         username, domain = recognized_params[:username_with_domain].gsub(/\A@/, '').split('@')
114:         return unless username.present? && domain.present?
115: 
116:         Account.find_remote(username, domain)
117:       end
118:     when 'collections'
119:       return unless recognized_params[:action] == 'show'
120: 
121:       check_collection(Collection.find_by(id: recognized_params[:id]))
122:     end
123:   end
124: 
125:   def check_collection(collection)
126:     return if collection.nil?
127: 
128:     authorize_with @on_behalf_of, collection, :show?
129:   rescue Mastodon::NotPermittedError
130:     nil
131:   end
132: 
133:   def check_local_status(status)
134:     return if status.nil?
135: 
136:     authorize_with @on_behalf_of, status, :show?
137:     status
138:   rescue Mastodon::NotPermittedError
139:     nil
140:   end
141: end

<type>file</type>
<content>
1: # frozen_string_literal: true
2: 
3: class FetchLinkCardService < BaseService
4:   include Redisable
5:   include Lockable
6: 
7:   URL_PATTERN = %r{
8:     (#{Twitter::TwitterText::Regex[:valid_url_preceding_chars]})                                                                #   $1 preceding chars
9:     (                                                                                                                           #   $2 URL
10:       (https?://)                                                                                                               #   $3 Protocol (required)
11:       (#{Twitter::TwitterText::Regex[:valid_domain]})                                                                           #   $4 Domain(s)
12:       (?::(#{Twitter::TwitterText::Regex[:valid_port_number]}))?                                                                #   $5 Port number (optional)
13:       (/#{Twitter::TwitterText::Regex[:valid_url_path]}*)?                                                                      #   $6 URL Path and anchor
14:       (\?#{Twitter::TwitterText::Regex[:valid_url_query_chars]}*#{Twitter::TwitterText::Regex[:valid_url_query_ending_chars]})? #   $7 Query String
15:     )
16:   }iox
17: 
18:   def call(status)
19:     @status       = status
20:     @original_url = parse_urls
21: 
22:     return if @original_url.nil? || @status.with_preview_card? || @status.with_media? || @status.quote.present?
23: 
24:     @url = @original_url.to_s
25: 
26:     with_redis_lock("fetch:#{@original_url}") do
27:       @card = PreviewCard.find_by(url: @url)
28:       process_url if @card.nil? || @card.updated_at <= 2.weeks.ago || @card.missing_image?
29:     end
30: 
31:     attach_card if @card&.persisted?
32:   rescue *Mastodon::HTTP_CONNECTION_ERRORS, Addressable::URI::InvalidURIError, Mastodon::HostValidationError, Mastodon::LengthValidationError, Encoding::UndefinedConversionError, ActiveRecord::RecordInvalid => e
33:     Rails.logger.debug { "Error fetching link #{@original_url}: #{e}" }
34:     nil
35:   end
36: 
37:   private
38: 
39:   def process_url
40:     @card ||= PreviewCard.new(url: @url)
41: 
42:     attempt_oembed || attempt_opengraph
43:   end
44: 
45:   def html
46:     return @html if defined?(@html)
47: 
48:     headers = {
49:       'Accept' => 'text/html',
50:       'Accept-Language' => "#{I18n.default_locale}, *;q=0.5",
51:       'User-Agent' => "#{Mastodon::Version.user_agent} Bot",
52:     }
53: 
54:     @html = Request.new(:get, @url).add_headers(headers).perform do |res|
55:       next unless res.code == 200 && res.mime_type == 'text/html'
56: 
57:       # We follow redirects, and ideally we want to save the preview card for
58:       # the destination URL and not any link shortener in-between, so here
59:       # we set the URL to the one of the last response in the redirect chain
60:       @url  = res.request.uri.to_s
61:       @card = PreviewCard.find_or_initialize_by(url: @url) if @card.url != @url
62: 
63:       @html_charset = res.charset
64: 
65:       res.truncated_body
66:     end
67:   end
68: 
69:   def attach_card
70:     with_redis_lock("attach_card:#{@status.id}") do
71:       return if @status.with_preview_card?
72: 
73:       PreviewCardsStatus.create(status: @status, preview_card: @card, url: @original_url)
74:       Rails.cache.delete(@status)
75:       Trends.links.register(@status)
76:     end
77:   end
78: 
79:   def parse_urls
80:     urls = if @status.local?
81:              @status.text.scan(URL_PATTERN).map { |array| Addressable::URI.parse(array[1]).normalize }
82:            else
83:              document = Nokogiri::HTML5(@status.text)
84:              links = document.css('a')
85: 
86:              links.filter_map { |a| Addressable::URI.parse(a['href']) unless skip_link?(a) }.filter_map(&:normalize)
87:            end
88: 
89:     urls.reject { |uri| bad_url?(uri) }.first
90:   end
91: 
92:   def bad_url?(uri)
93:     # Avoid local instance URLs and invalid URLs
94:     uri.host.blank? || TagManager.instance.local_url?(uri.to_s) || !%w(http https).include?(uri.scheme)
95:   end
96: 
97:   def mention_link?(anchor)
98:     @status.mentions.any? do |mention|
99:       anchor['href'] == ActivityPub::TagManager.instance.url_for(mention.account)
100:     end
101:   end
102: 
103:   def skip_link?(anchor)
104:     # Avoid links for hashtags and mentions (microformats)
105:     anchor['rel']&.include?('tag') || anchor['class']&.match?(/u-url|h-card/) || mention_link?(anchor)
106:   end
107: 
108:   def attempt_oembed
109:     service         = FetchOEmbedService.new
110:     url_domain      = Addressable::URI.parse(@url).normalized_host
111:     cached_endpoint = Rails.cache.read("oembed_endpoint:#{url_domain}")
112: 
113:     embed   = service.call(@url, cached_endpoint: cached_endpoint) unless cached_endpoint.nil?
114:     embed ||= service.call(@url, html: html) unless html.nil?
115: 
116:     return false if embed.nil?
117: 
118:     url = Addressable::URI.parse(service.endpoint_url)
119: 
120:     @card.type          = embed[:type]
121:     @card.title         = embed[:title]         || ''
122:     @card.author_name   = embed[:author_name]   || ''
123:     @card.author_url    = embed[:author_url].present? ? (url + embed[:author_url]).to_s : ''
124:     @card.provider_name = embed[:provider_name] || ''
125:     @card.provider_url  = embed[:provider_url].present? ? (url + embed[:provider_url]).to_s : ''
126:     @card.width         = 0
127:     @card.height        = 0
128: 
129:     case @card.type
130:     when 'link'
131:       @card.image_remote_url = (url + embed[:thumbnail_url]).to_s if embed[:thumbnail_url].present?
132:     when 'photo'
133:       return false if embed[:url].blank?
134: 
135:       @card.embed_url        = (url + embed[:url]).to_s
136:       @card.image_remote_url = (url + embed[:url]).to_s
137:       @card.width            = embed[:width].presence  || 0
138:       @card.height           = embed[:height].presence || 0
139:     when 'video'
140:       @card.width            = embed[:width].presence  || 0
141:       @card.height           = embed[:height].presence || 0
142:       @card.html             = Sanitize.fragment(embed[:html], Sanitize::Config::MASTODON_OEMBED)
143:       @card.image_remote_url = (url + embed[:thumbnail_url]).to_s if embed[:thumbnail_url].present?
144:     when 'rich'
145:       # Most providers rely on <script> tags, which is a no-no
146:       return false
147:     end
148: 
149:     @card.save_with_optional_image!
150:   end
151: 
152:   def attempt_opengraph
153:     return if html.nil?
154: 
155:     link_details_extractor = LinkDetailsExtractor.new(@url, @html, @html_charset)
156:     domain = Addressable::URI.parse(link_details_extractor.canonical_url).normalized_host
157:     provider = PreviewCardProvider.matching_domain(domain)
158:     linked_account = ResolveAccountService.new.call(link_details_extractor.author_account, suppress_errors: true) if link_details_extractor.author_account.present?
159: 
160:     @card = PreviewCard.find_or_initialize_by(url: link_details_extractor.canonical_url) if link_details_extractor.canonical_url != @card.url
161:     @card.assign_attributes(link_details_extractor.to_preview_card_attributes)
162: 
163:     if linked_account.present?
164:       # There is an overlap in the two conditions when `provider` is trendable. This is on purpose to give users
165:       # a heads-up before we remove the `provider&.trendable?` condition.
166:       @card.author_account = linked_account if linked_account.can_be_attributed_from?(domain) || provider&.trendable?
167:       @card.unverified_author_account = linked_account if linked_account.local? && !linked_account.can_be_attributed_from?(domain)
168:     end
169: 
170:     @card.save_with_optional_image! unless @card.title.blank? && @card.html.blank?
171:   end
172: end

(End of file - total 172 lines)
</content>

1: # frozen_string_literal: true
2: 
3: class ReportService < BaseService
4:   include Payloadable
5: 
6:   def call(source_account, target_account, options = {})
7:     @source_account = source_account
8:     @target_account = target_account
9:     @status_ids     = options.delete(:status_ids).presence || []
10:     @collection_ids = options.delete(:collection_ids).presence || []
11:     @comment        = options.delete(:comment).presence || ''
12:     @category       = options[:rule_ids].present? ? 'violation' : (options.delete(:category).presence || 'other')
13:     @rule_ids       = options.delete(:rule_ids).presence
14:     @application    = options.delete(:application).presence
15:     @options        = options
16: 
17:     raise ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound if @target_account.unavailable?
18: 
19:     create_report!
20:     notify_staff!
21: 
22:     if forward?
23:       forward_to_origin!
24:       forward_to_replied_to!
25:     end
26: 
27:     @report
28:   end
29: 
30:   private
31: 
32:   def create_report!
33:     @report = @source_account.reports.create!(
34:       target_account: @target_account,
35:       status_ids: reported_status_ids,
36:       collection_ids: reported_collection_ids,
37:       comment: @comment,
38:       uri: @options[:uri],
39:       forwarded: forward_to_origin?,
40:       category: @category,
41:       rule_ids: @rule_ids,
42:       application: @application
43:     )
44:   end
45: 
46:   def notify_staff!
47:     return if @report.unresolved_siblings?
48: 
49:     User.those_who_can(:manage_reports).includes(:account).find_each do |u|
50:       LocalNotificationWorker.perform_async(u.account_id, @report.id, 'Report', 'admin.report')
51:       AdminMailer.with(recipient: u.account).new_report(@report).deliver_later if u.allows_report_emails?
52:     end
53:   end
54: 
55:   def forward_to_origin!
56:     return unless forward_to_origin?
57: 
58:     # Send report to the server where the account originates from
59:     ActivityPub::DeliveryWorker.perform_async(payload, some_local_account.id, @target_account.inbox_url)
60:   end
61: 
62:   def forward_to_replied_to!
63:     # Send report to servers to which the account was replying to, so they also have a chance to act
64:     inbox_urls = Account.remote.where(domain: forward_to_domains).where(id: Status.where(id: reported_status_ids).where.not(in_reply_to_account_id: nil).select(:in_reply_to_account_id)).inboxes - [@target_account.inbox_url, @target_account.shared_inbox_url]
65: 
66:     inbox_urls.each do |inbox_url|
67:       ActivityPub::DeliveryWorker.perform_async(payload, some_local_account.id, inbox_url)
68:     end
69:   end
70: 
71:   def forward?
72:     !@target_account.local? && ActiveModel::Type::Boolean.new.cast(@options[:forward])
73:   end
74: 
75:   def forward_to_origin?
76:     forward? && forward_to_domains.include?(@target_account.domain)
77:   end
78: 
79:   def forward_to_domains
80:     @forward_to_domains ||= (@options[:forward_to_domains] || [@target_account.domain]).filter_map { |domain| TagManager.instance.normalize_domain(domain) }.uniq
81:   end
82: 
83:   def reported_status_ids
84:     return AccountStatusesFilter.new(@target_account, @source_account).results.with_discarded.find(Array(@status_ids)).pluck(:id) if @source_account.local?
85: 
86:     # If the account making reports is remote, it is likely anonymized so we have to relax the requirements for attaching statuses.
87:     domain = @source_account.domain.to_s.downcase
88:     has_followers = @target_account.followers.with_domain(domain).exists?
89:     visibility = has_followers ? %i(public unlisted private) : %i(public unlisted)
90:     scope = @target_account.statuses.with_discarded
91:     scope.merge!(scope.where(visibility: visibility).or(scope.where(domain_mentions(domain))))
92:     # Allow missing posts to not drop reports that include e.g. a deleted post
93:     scope.where(id: Array(@status_ids)).pluck(:id)
94:   end
95: 
96:   def domain_mentions(domain)
97:     Mention
98:       .joins(:account)
99:       .merge(Account.with_domain(domain))
100:       .select(1).arel.exists
101:   end
102: 
103:   def reported_collection_ids
104:     @target_account.collections.find(Array(@collection_ids)).pluck(:id)
105:   end
106: 
107:   def payload
108:     serialize_payload(@report, ActivityPub::FlagSerializer, account: some_local_account).to_json
109:   end
110: 
111:   def some_local_account
112:     @some_local_account ||= Account.representative
113:   end
114: end

1: # frozen_string_literal: true
2: 
3: require 'zip'
4: 
5: class BackupService < BaseService
6:   include Payloadable
7:   include ContextHelper
8: 
9:   CHUNK_SIZE = 1.megabyte
10:   PLACEHOLDER = '!PLACEHOLDER!'
11: 
12:   STREAM_ACTOR = 'actor.json'
13:   STREAM_BOOKMARKS = 'bookmarks.json'
14:   STREAM_LIKES = 'likes.json'
15:   STREAM_OUTBOX = 'outbox.json'
16: 
17:   attr_reader :account, :backup
18: 
19:   def call(backup)
20:     @backup  = backup
21:     @account = backup.user.account
22: 
23:     build_archive!
24:   end
25: 
26:   private
27: 
28:   def build_outbox_json!(file)
29:     skeleton = serialize(collection_presenter(STREAM_OUTBOX, size: account.statuses.count), ActivityPub::CollectionSerializer)
30:     skeleton[:@context] = full_context
31:     skeleton[:orderedItems] = [PLACEHOLDER]
32:     skeleton = skeleton.to_json
33:     prepend, append = skeleton.split(PLACEHOLDER.to_json)
34: 
35:     file.write(prepend)
36: 
37:     account.statuses.with_includes.reorder(nil).find_in_batches.with_index do |statuses, batch|
38:       file.write(',') unless batch.zero?
39: 
40:       file.write(statuses.map do |status|
41:         serializer = status.reblog? ? ActivityPub::AnnounceNoteSerializer : ActivityPub::CreateNoteSerializer
42:         item = serialize_payload(status, serializer)
43:         item.delete(:@context)
44: 
45:         unless item[:type] == 'Announce' || item[:object][:attachment].blank?
46:           item[:object][:attachment].each do |attachment|
47:             attachment[:url] = Addressable::URI.parse(attachment[:url]).path.delete_prefix('/system/')
48:           end
49:         end
50: 
51:         item.to_json
52:       end.join(','))
53: 
54:       GC.start
55:     end
56: 
57:     file.write(append)
58:   end
59: 
60:   def build_archive!
61:     tmp_file = Tempfile.new(%w(archive .zip))
62: 
63:     build_zip_file(tmp_file)
64: 
65:     @backup.dump = ActionDispatch::Http::UploadedFile.new(tempfile: tmp_file, filename: archive_filename)
66:     @backup.processed = true
67:     @backup.save!
68:   ensure
69:     tmp_file.close
70:     tmp_file.unlink
71:   end
72: 
73:   def build_zip_file(file)
74:     Zip::File.open(file, create: true) do |zip|
75:       dump_outbox!(zip)
76:       dump_media_attachments!(zip)
77:       dump_likes!(zip)
78:       dump_bookmarks!(zip)
79:       dump_actor!(zip)
80:     end
81:   end
82: 
83:   def archive_filename
84:     "#{archive_id}.zip"
85:   end
86: 
87:   def archive_id
88:     [:archive, Time.current.to_fs(:number), SecureRandom.hex(16)].join('-')
89:   end
90: 
91:   def dump_media_attachments!(zipfile)
92:     MediaAttachment.attached.where(account: account).find_in_batches do |media_attachments|
93:       media_attachments.each do |m|
94:         path = m.file&.path
95:         next unless path
96: 
97:         path = path.gsub(%r{\A.*/system/}, '')
98:         path = path.gsub(%r{\A/+}, '')
99:         download_to_zip(zipfile, m.file, path)
100:       end
101: 
102:       GC.start
103:     end
104:   end
105: 
106:   def dump_outbox!(zipfile)
107:     zipfile.get_output_stream(STREAM_OUTBOX) do |io|
108:       build_outbox_json!(io)
109:     end
110:   end
111: 
112:   def dump_actor!(zipfile)
113:     actor = serialize(account, ActivityPub::ActorSerializer)
114: 
115:     actor[:icon][:url]  = "avatar#{File.extname(actor[:icon][:url])}"  if actor[:icon]
116:     actor[:image][:url] = "header#{File.extname(actor[:image][:url])}" if actor[:image]
117:     actor[:outbox]      = STREAM_OUTBOX
118:     actor[:likes]       = STREAM_LIKES
119:     actor[:bookmarks]   = STREAM_BOOKMARKS
120: 
121:     download_to_zip(zipfile, account.avatar, "avatar#{File.extname(account.avatar.path)}") if account.avatar.exists?
122:     download_to_zip(zipfile, account.header, "header#{File.extname(account.header.path)}") if account.header.exists?
123: 
124:     zipfile.get_output_stream(STREAM_ACTOR) do |io|
125:       io.write(actor.to_json)
126:     end
127:   end
128: 
129:   def dump_likes!(zipfile)
130:     skeleton = serialize(collection_presenter(STREAM_LIKES), ActivityPub::CollectionSerializer)
131: 
132:     skeleton.delete(:totalItems)
133:     skeleton[:orderedItems] = [PLACEHOLDER]
134:     skeleton = skeleton.to_json
135:     prepend, append = skeleton.split(PLACEHOLDER.to_json)
136: 
137:     zipfile.get_output_stream(STREAM_LIKES) do |io|
138:       io.write(prepend)
139: 
140:       favourite_statuses.find_in_batches.with_index do |statuses, batch|
141:         io.write(',') unless batch.zero?
142: 
143:         io.write(statuses.map do |status|
144:           ActivityPub::TagManager.instance.uri_for(status).to_json
145:         end.join(','))
146: 
147:         GC.start
148:       end
149: 
150:       io.write(append)
151:     end
152:   end
153: 
154:   def favourite_statuses
155:     Status.reorder(nil).joins(:favourites).includes(:account).merge(account.favourites)
156:   end
157: 
158:   def dump_bookmarks!(zipfile)
159:     skeleton = serialize(collection_presenter(STREAM_BOOKMARKS), ActivityPub::CollectionSerializer)
160:     skeleton.delete(:totalItems)
161:     skeleton[:orderedItems] = [PLACEHOLDER]
162:     skeleton = skeleton.to_json
163:     prepend, append = skeleton.split(PLACEHOLDER.to_json)
164: 
165:     zipfile.get_output_stream(STREAM_BOOKMARKS) do |io|
166:       io.write(prepend)
167: 
168:       bookmark_statuses.find_in_batches.with_index do |statuses, batch|
169:         io.write(',') unless batch.zero?
170: 
171:         io.write(statuses.map do |status|
172:           ActivityPub::TagManager.instance.uri_for(status).to_json
173:         end.join(','))
174: 
175:         GC.start
176:       end
177: 
178:       io.write(append)
179:     end
180:   end
181: 
182:   def bookmark_statuses
183:     Status.reorder(nil).joins(:bookmarks).includes(:account).merge(account.bookmarks)
184:   end
185: 
186:   def collection_presenter(id, size: 0)
187:     ActivityPub::CollectionPresenter.new(
188:       id:,
189:       items: [],
190:       size:,
191:       type: :ordered
192:     )
193:   end
194: 
195:   def serialize(object, serializer)
196:     ActiveModelSerializers::SerializableResource.new(
197:       object,
198:       serializer: serializer,
199:       adapter: ActivityPub::Adapter
200:     ).as_json
201:   end
202: 
203:   def download_to_zip(zipfile, attachment, filename)
204:     adapter = Paperclip.io_adapters.for(attachment)
205: 
206:     zipfile.get_output_stream(filename) do |io|
207:       while (buffer = adapter.read(CHUNK_SIZE))
208:         io.write(buffer)
209:       end
210:     end
211:   rescue Errno::ENOENT, Seahorse::Client::NetworkingError => e
212:     Rails.logger.warn "Could not backup file #{filename}: #{e}"
213:   end
214: end

1: # frozen_string_literal: true
2: 
3: class BulkImportRowService
4:   STOPLIGHT_COOL_OFF_TIME = 5.minutes.seconds
5:   STOPLIGHT_THRESHOLD = 1
6: 
7:   def call(row)
8:     @account = row.bulk_import.account
9:     @data    = row.data
10:     @type    = row.bulk_import.type.to_sym
11: 
12:     case @type
13:     when :following, :blocking, :muting, :lists
14:       target_acct     = @data['acct']
15:       target_domain   = domain(target_acct)
16:       @target_account = stoplight_wrapper(target_domain).run(stoplight_fallback) { ResolveAccountService.new.call(target_acct, { check_delivery_availability: true }) }
17:       return false if @target_account.nil?
18:     when :bookmarks
19:       target_uri      = @data['uri']
20:       target_domain   = Addressable::URI.parse(target_uri).normalized_host
21:       @target_status = ActivityPub::TagManager.instance.uri_to_resource(target_uri, Status)
22:       return false if @target_status.nil? && ActivityPub::TagManager.instance.local_uri?(target_uri)
23: 
24:       @target_status ||= stoplight_wrapper(target_domain).run(stoplight_fallback) { ActivityPub::FetchRemoteStatusService.new.call(target_uri) }
25:       return false if @target_status.nil?
26:     end
27: 
28:     case @type
29:     when :following
30:       FollowService.new.call(@account, @target_account, reblogs: @data['show_reblogs'], notify: @data['notify'], languages: @data['languages'])
31:     when :blocking
32:       BlockService.new.call(@account, @target_account)
33:     when :muting
34:       MuteService.new.call(@account, @target_account, notifications: @data['hide_notifications'])
35:     when :bookmarks
36:       return false unless StatusPolicy.new(@account, @target_status).show?
37: 
38:       @account.bookmarks.find_or_create_by!(status: @target_status)
39:     when :lists
40:       list = @account.owned_lists.find_or_create_by!(title: @data['list_name'])
41: 
42:       FollowService.new.call(@account, @target_account) unless @account.id == @target_account.id
43: 
44:       list.accounts << @target_account
45:     when :custom_filters
46:       filter = @account.custom_filters.create!(title: @data['title'], context: @data['context'])
47:       filter.keywords = @data['keywords_attributes'].map { |keyword| CustomFilterKeyword.new(keyword: keyword['keyword'], whole_word: keyword['whole_word']) }
48:       filter.action = @data['action'].to_sym
49:       filter.expires_at = @data['expires_at']
50:       status_ids = Status.where(uri: @data['statuses']).ids
51:       filter.statuses = status_ids.map { |status| CustomFilterStatus.new(status_id: status) } if status_ids.any?
52:       filter.save!
53:     end
54: 
55:     true
56:   rescue ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound
57:     false
58:   end
59: 
60:   def domain(uri)
61:     domain = uri.is_a?(Account) ? uri.domain : uri.split('@')[1]
62:     TagManager.instance.local_domain?(domain) ? nil : TagManager.instance.normalize_domain(domain)
63:   end
64: 
65:   def stoplight_fallback
66:     ->(error) {}
67:   end
68: 
69:   def stoplight_wrapper(domain)
70:     if domain.present?
71:       Stoplight(
72:         "source:#{domain}",
73:         cool_off_time: STOPLIGHT_COOL_OFF_TIME,
74:         threshold: STOPLIGHT_THRESHOLD,
75:         tracked_errors: [HTTP::Error, OpenSSL::SSL::SSLError]
76:       )
77:     else
78:       Stoplight('domain-blank')
79:     end
80:   end
81: end

1: # frozen_string_literal: true
2: 
3: class SearchService < BaseService
4:   QUOTE_EQUIVALENT_CHARACTERS = /[“”„«»「」『』《》]/
5: 
6:   def call(query, account, limit, options = {})
7:     @query     = query&.strip&.gsub(QUOTE_EQUIVALENT_CHARACTERS, '"')
8:     @account   = account
9:     @options   = options
10:     @limit     = limit.to_i
11:     @offset    = options[:type].blank? ? 0 : options[:offset].to_i
12:     @resolve   = options[:resolve] || false
13:     @following = options[:following] || false
14:     @query_fasp = options[:query_fasp] || false
15: 
16:     default_results.tap do |results|
17:       next if @query.blank? || @limit.zero?
18: 
19:       if url_query?
20:         results.merge!(url_resource_results) unless url_resource.nil? || @offset.positive? || (@options[:type].present? && url_resource_symbol != @options[:type].to_sym)
21:       elsif @query.present?
22:         results[:accounts] = perform_accounts_search! if account_searchable?
23:         results[:statuses] = perform_statuses_search! if status_searchable?
24:         results[:hashtags] = perform_hashtags_search! if hashtag_searchable?
25:       end
26:     end
27:   end
28: 
29:   private
30: 
31:   def perform_accounts_search!
32:     AccountSearchService.new.call(
33:       @query,
34:       @account,
35:       limit: @limit,
36:       resolve: @resolve,
37:       offset: @offset,
38:       use_searchable_text: true,
39:       following: @following,
40:       start_with_hashtag: @query.start_with?('#'),
41:       query_fasp: @options[:query_fasp]
42:     )
43:   end
44: 
45:   def perform_statuses_search!
46:     StatusesSearchService.new.call(
47:       @query,
48:       @account,
49:       limit: @limit,
50:       offset: @offset,
51:       account_id: @options[:account_id],
52:       min_id: @options[:min_id],
53:       max_id: @options[:max_id]
54:     )
55:   end
56: 
57:   def perform_hashtags_search!
58:     TagSearchService.new.call(
59:       @query,
60:       limit: @limit,
61:       offset: @offset,
62:       exclude_unreviewed: @options[:exclude_unreviewed]
63:     )
64:   end
65: 
66:   def default_results
67:     { accounts: [], hashtags: [], statuses: [], collections: [] }
68:   end
69: 
70:   def url_query?
71:     @resolve && %r{\Ahttps?://}.match?(@query)
72:   end
73: 
74:   def url_resource_results
75:     { url_resource_symbol => [url_resource] }
76:   end
77: 
78:   def url_resource
79:     @url_resource ||= ResolveURLService.new.call(@query, on_behalf_of: @account)
80:   end
81: 
82:   def url_resource_symbol
83:     url_resource.class.name.downcase.pluralize.to_sym
84:   end
85: 
86:   def status_searchable?
87:     Chewy.enabled? && status_search? && @account.present?
88:   end
89: 
90:   def account_searchable?
91:     account_search?
92:   end
93: 
94:   def hashtag_searchable?
95:     hashtag_search?
96:   end
97: 
98:   def account_search?
99:     @options[:type].blank? || @options[:type] == 'accounts'
100:   end
101: 
102:   def hashtag_search?
103:     @options[:type].blank? || @options[:type] == 'hashtags'
104:   end
105: 
106:   def status_search?
107:     @options[:type].blank? || @options[:type] == 'statuses'
108:   end
109: end

1: # frozen_string_literal: true
2: 
3: class StatusesSearchService < BaseService
4:   include SearchStoplight
5: 
6:   def call(query, account = nil, options = {})
7:     MastodonOTELTracer.in_span('StatusesSearchService#call') do |span|
8:       @query   = query&.strip
9:       @account = account
10:       @options = options
11:       @limit   = options[:limit].to_i
12:       @offset  = options[:offset].to_i
13:       convert_deprecated_options!
14: 
15:       span.add_attributes(
16:         'search.offset' => @offset,
17:         'search.limit' => @limit,
18:         'search.backend' => Chewy.enabled? ? 'elasticsearch' : 'database'
19:       )
20: 
21:       status_search_results.tap do |results|
22:         span.set_attribute('search.results.count', results.size)
23:       end
24:     end
25:   end
26: 
27:   private
28: 
29:   def status_search_results
30:     request             = parsed_query.request
31:     results             = elastic_stoplight_wrapper.run { request.collapse(field: :id).order(id: { order: :desc }).limit(@limit).offset(@offset).objects.compact }
32:     account_ids         = results.map(&:account_id)
33:     account_domains     = results.map(&:account_domain)
34: 
35:     @account.preload_relations!(account_ids, account_domains)
36: 
37:     results.reject { |status| StatusFilter.new(status, @account).filtered? }
38:   rescue Stoplight::Error::RedLight, Faraday::ConnectionFailed, Parslet::ParseFailed, Errno::ENETUNREACH, OpenSSL::SSL::SSLError, Elastic::Transport::Transport::Error
39:     []
40:   end
41: 
42:   def parsed_query
43:     SearchQueryTransformer.new.apply(SearchQueryParser.new.parse(@query), current_account: @account)
44:   end
45: 
46:   def convert_deprecated_options!
47:     syntax_options = []
48: 
49:     if @options[:account_id]
50:       username = Account.select(:username, :domain).find(@options[:account_id]).acct
51:       syntax_options << "from:@#{username}"
52:     end
53: 
54:     if @options[:min_id]
55:       timestamp = Mastodon::Snowflake.to_time(@options[:min_id].to_i)
56:       syntax_options << "after:\"#{timestamp.iso8601}\""
57:     end
58: 
59:     if @options[:max_id]
60:       timestamp = Mastodon::Snowflake.to_time(@options[:max_id].to_i)
61:       syntax_options << "before:\"#{timestamp.iso8601}\""
62:     end
63: 
64:     @query = "#{@query} #{syntax_options.join(' ')}".strip if syntax_options.any?
65:   end
66: end

1: # frozen_string_literal: true
2: 
3: class Trends::Statuses < Trends::Base
4:   PREFIX = 'trending_statuses'
5: 
6:   BATCH_SIZE = 100
7: 
8:   self.default_options = {
9:     threshold: 5,
10:     review_threshold: 3,
11:     score_halflife: 1.hour.freeze,
12:     decay_threshold: 0.3,
13:   }
14: 
15:   class Query < Trends::Query
16:     def to_arel
17:       scope = Status.joins(:trend).reorder(score: :desc)
18:       scope = scope.reorder(language_order_clause, score: :desc) if preferred_languages.present?
19:       scope = scope.merge(StatusTrend.allowed) if @allowed
20:       scope = scope.not_excluded_by_account(@account).not_domain_blocked_by_account(@account) if @account.present?
21:       scope = scope.offset(@offset) if @offset.present?
22:       scope = scope.limit(@limit) if @limit.present?
23:       scope
24:     end
25: 
26:     private
27: 
28:     def trend_class
29:       StatusTrend
30:     end
31:   end
32: 
33:   def register(status, at_time = Time.now.utc)
34:     add(status.proper, status.account_id, at_time) if eligible?(status.proper)
35:   end
36: 
37:   def add(status, _account_id, at_time = Time.now.utc)
38:     record_used_id(status.id, at_time)
39:   end
40: 
41:   def query
42:     Query.new(key_prefix, klass)
43:   end
44: 
45:   def refresh(at_time = Time.now.utc)
46:     # First, recalculate scores for statuses that were trending previously. We split the queries
47:     # to avoid having to load all of the IDs into Ruby just to send them back into Postgres
48:     Status.where(id: StatusTrend.select(:status_id)).includes(:status_stat, :account).reorder(nil).find_in_batches(batch_size: BATCH_SIZE) do |statuses|
49:       calculate_scores(statuses, at_time)
50:     end
51: 
52:     # Then, calculate scores for statuses that were used today. There are potentially some
53:     # duplicate items here that we might process one more time, but that should be fine
54:     Status.where(id: recently_used_ids(at_time)).includes(:status_stat, :account).reorder(nil).find_in_batches(batch_size: BATCH_SIZE) do |statuses|
55:       calculate_scores(statuses, at_time)
56:     end
57: 
58:     # Now that all trends have up-to-date scores, and all the ones below the threshold have
59:     # been removed, we can recalculate their positions
60:     StatusTrend.recalculate_ordered_rank
61:   end
62: 
63:   def request_review
64:     StatusTrend.locales.flat_map do |language|
65:       score_at_threshold = StatusTrend.where(language: language, allowed: true).by_rank.ranked_below(options[:review_threshold]).first&.score || 0
66:       status_trends      = StatusTrend.where(language: language, allowed: false).joins(:status).includes(status: :account)
67: 
68:       status_trends.filter_map do |trend|
69:         status = trend.status
70: 
71:         if trend.score > score_at_threshold && !status.trendable? && status.requires_review_notification?
72:           status.account.touch(:requested_review_at)
73:           status
74:         end
75:       end
76:     end
77:   end
78: 
79:   protected
80: 
81:   def key_prefix
82:     PREFIX
83:   end
84: 
85:   def klass
86:     Status
87:   end
88: 
89:   private
90: 
91:   def eligible?(status)
92:     status.created_at.past? &&
93:       opted_into_trends?(status) &&
94:       !sensitive_content?(status) &&
95:       !status.reply? &&
96:       valid_locale?(status.language) &&
97:       (status.quote.nil? || trendable_quote?(status.quote))
98:   end
99: 
100:   def opted_into_trends?(status)
101:     status.public_visibility? &&
102:       status.account.discoverable? &&
103:       !status.account.silenced?
104:   end
105: 
106:   def sensitive_content?(status)
107:     status.account.sensitized? || status.spoiler_text.present? || status.sensitive?
108:   end
109: 
110:   def trendable_quote?(quote)
111:     quote.acceptable? &&
112:       quote.quoted_status.present? &&
113:       opted_into_trends?(quote.quoted_status) &&
114:       !sensitive_content?(quote.quoted_status)
115:   end
116: 
117:   def calculate_scores(statuses, at_time)
118:     items = statuses.map do |status|
119:       expected  = 1.0
120:       observed  = (status.reblogs_count + status.favourites_count).to_f
121: 
122:       score = if expected > observed || observed < options[:threshold]
123:                 0
124:               else
125:                 ((observed - expected)**2) / expected
126:               end
127: 
128:       decaying_score = if score.zero? || !eligible?(status)
129:                          0
130:                        else
131:                          score * (0.5**((at_time.to_f - status.created_at.to_f) / options[:score_halflife].to_f))
132:                        end
133: 
134:       [decaying_score, status]
135:     end
136: 
137:     to_insert = items.filter { |(score, _)| score >= options[:decay_threshold] }
138:     to_delete = items.filter { |(score, _)| score < options[:decay_threshold] }
139: 
140:     StatusTrend.upsert_all(to_insert.map { |(score, status)| { status_id: status.id, account_id: status.account_id, score: score, language: status.language, allowed: status.trendable? || false } }, unique_by: :status_id) if to_insert.any?
141:     StatusTrend.where(status_id: to_delete.map { |(_, status)| status.id }).delete_all if to_delete.any?
142:   end
143: end

3: class Trends::StatusBatch
4:   include ActiveModel::Model
5:   include Authorization
6: 
7:   attr_accessor :status_ids, :action, :current_account
8: 
9:   def save
10:     case action
11:     when 'approve'
12:       approve!
13:     when 'approve_accounts'
14:       approve_accounts!
15:     when 'reject'
16:       reject!
17:     when 'reject_accounts'
18:       reject_accounts!
19:     end
20:   end
21: 
22:   private
23: 
24:   def statuses
25:     @statuses ||= Status.where(id: status_ids)
26:   end
27: 
28:   def status_accounts
29:     @status_accounts ||= Account.where(id: statuses.map(&:account_id).uniq)
30:   end
31: 
32:   def approve!
33:     statuses.each { |status| authorize([:admin, status], :review?) }
34:     statuses.update_all(trendable: true)
35:   end
36: 
37:   def approve_accounts!
38:     status_accounts.each do |account|
39:       authorize(account, :review?)
40:       account.update(trendable: true, reviewed_at: action_time)
41:     end
42: 
43:     # Reset any individual overrides
44:     statuses.update_all(trendable: nil)
45:   end
46: 
47:   def reject!
48:     statuses.each { |status| authorize([:admin, status], :review?) }
49:     statuses.update_all(trendable: false)
50:   end
51: 
52:   def reject_accounts!
53:     status_accounts.each do |account|
54:       authorize(account, :review?)
55:       account.update(trendable: false, reviewed_at: action_time)
56:     end
57: 
58:     # Reset any individual overrides
59:     statuses.update_all(trendable: nil)
60:   end
61: 
62:   def action_time
63:     @action_time ||= Time.now.utc
64:   end
65: end

7:   ).freeze
8: 
9:   IGNORED_PARAMS = %w(page report_id).freeze
10:

14:     @account = account

18:   def results

20: 
21:     params.each do |key, value|
22:       next if IGNORED_PARAMS.include?(key.to_s)
23: 
24:       scope.merge!(scope_for(key, value.to_s.strip)) if value.present?
25:     end
26: 
27:     scope

1: # frozen_string_literal: true
2: 
3: class Admin::ModerationAction < Admin::BaseAction
4:   TYPES = %w(
5:     delete
6:     mark_as_sensitive
7:   ).freeze
8: 
9:   validates :report_id, presence: true
10: 
11:   private
12: 
13:   def status_ids
14:     report.status_ids
15:   end
16: 
17:   def statuses
18:     @statuses ||= Status.with_discarded.where(id: status_ids).reorder(nil)
19:   end
20: 
21:   def collections
22:     report.collections
23:   end
24: 
25:   def process_action!
26:     case type
27:     when 'delete'
28:       handle_delete!
29:     when 'mark_as_sensitive'
30:       handle_mark_as_sensitive!
31:     end
32:   end
33: 
34:   def handle_delete!
35:     statuses.each { |status| authorize([:admin, status], :destroy?) }
36:     collections.each { |collection| authorize([:admin, collection], :destroy?) }
37: 
38:     ApplicationRecord.transaction do
39:       delete_statuses!
40:       delete_collections!
41: 
42:       resolve_report!
43:       process_strike!(:delete_statuses)
44: 
45:       create_tombstones! unless target_account.local?
46:     end
47: 
48:     process_notification!
49: 
50:     RemovalWorker.push_bulk(status_ids) { |status_id| [status_id, { 'preserve' => target_account.local?, 'immediate' => !target_account.local? }] }
51:   end
52: 
53:   def handle_mark_as_sensitive!
54:     collections.each { |collection| authorize([:admin, collection], :update?) }
55: 
56:     # Can't use a transaction here because UpdateStatusService queues
57:     # Sidekiq jobs
58:     mark_statuses_as_sensitive!
59:     mark_collections_as_sensitive!
60: 
61:     resolve_report!
62:     process_strike!(:mark_statuses_as_sensitive)
63:     process_notification!
64:   end
65: 
66:   def delete_statuses!
67:     statuses.each do |status|
68:       status.discard_with_reblogs
69:       log_action(:destroy, status)
70:     end
71:   end
72: 
73:   def delete_collections!
74:     collections.each do |collection|
75:       collection.destroy!
76:       log_action(:destroy, collection)
77:     end
78:   end
79: 
80:   def create_tombstones!
81:     (statuses + collections).each { |record| Tombstone.find_or_create_by(uri: record.uri, account: target_account, by_moderator: true) }
82:   end
83: 
84:   def mark_statuses_as_sensitive!
85:     representative_account = Account.representative
86: 
87:     statuses.includes(:media_attachments, preview_cards_status: :preview_card).find_each do |status|
88:       next if status.discarded? || !(status.with_media? || status.with_preview_card?)
89: 
90:       authorize([:admin, status], :update?)
91: 
92:       if target_account.local?
93:         UpdateStatusService.new.call(status, representative_account.id, sensitive: true)
94:       else
95:         status.update(sensitive: true)
96:       end
97: 
98:       log_action(:update, status)
99:     end
100:   end
101: 
102:   def mark_collections_as_sensitive!
103:     collections.each do |collection|
104:       UpdateCollectionService.new.call(collection, sensitive: true)
105: 
106:       log_action(:update, collection)
107:     end
108:   end
109: 
110:   def resolve_report!
111:     report.resolve!(current_account)
112:     log_action(:resolve, report)
113:   end
114: 
115:   def target_account
116:     report.target_account
117:   end
118: 
119:   def text_for_warning = text
120: end

(End of file - total 120 lines)

1: # frozen_string_literal: true
2: 
3: class DeleteAccountService < BaseService
4:   include Payloadable
5: 
6:   ASSOCIATIONS_ON_SUSPEND = %w(
7:     account_notes
8:     account_pins
9:     active_relationships
10:     aliases
11:     block_relationships
12:     blocked_by_relationships
13:     conversation_mutes
14:     conversations
15:     custom_filters
16:     domain_blocks
17:     featured_tags
18:     follow_requests
19:     list_accounts
20:     migrations
21:     mute_relationships
22:     muted_by_relationships
23:     notifications
24:     owned_lists
25:     passive_relationships
26:     report_notes
27:     scheduled_statuses
28:     status_pins
29:   ).freeze
30: 
31:   # The following associations have no important side-effects
32:   # in callbacks and all of their own associations are secured
33:   # by foreign keys, making them safe to delete without loading
34:   # into memory
35:   ASSOCIATIONS_WITHOUT_SIDE_EFFECTS = %w(
36:     account_notes
37:     account_pins
38:     aliases
39:     conversation_mutes
40:     conversations
41:     custom_filters
42:     domain_blocks
43:     featured_tags
44:     follow_requests
45:     list_accounts
46:     migrations
47:     mute_relationships
48:     muted_by_relationships
49:     notifications
50:     owned_lists
51:     scheduled_statuses
52:     status_pins
53:     tag_follows
54:   ).freeze
55: 
56:   ASSOCIATIONS_ON_DESTROY = %w(
57:     reports
58:     targeted_moderation_notes
59:     targeted_reports
60:     severed_relationships
61:     remote_severed_relationships
62:   ).freeze
63: 
64:   # Suspend or remove an account and remove as much of its data
65:   # as possible. If it's a local account and it has not been confirmed
66:   # or never been approved, then side effects are skipped and both
67:   # the user and account records are removed fully. Otherwise,
68:   # it is controlled by options.
69:   # @param [Account]
70:   # @param [Hash] options
71:   # @option [Boolean] :reserve_email Keep user record. Only applicable for local accounts
72:   # @option [Boolean] :reserve_username Keep account record
73:   # @option [Boolean] :skip_side_effects Side effects are ActivityPub and streaming API payloads
74:   # @option [Boolean] :skip_activitypub Skip sending ActivityPub payloads. Implied by :skip_side_effects
75:   # @option [Time]    :suspended_at Only applicable when :reserve_username is true
76:   # @option [RelationshipSeveranceEvent] :relationship_severance_event Event used to record severed relationships not initiated by the user
77:   def call(account, **options)
78:     @account = account
79:     @options = { reserve_username: true, reserve_email: true }.merge(options)
80: 
81:     if @account.local? && @account.user_unconfirmed_or_pending?
82:       @options[:reserve_email]     = false
83:       @options[:reserve_username]  = false
84:       @options[:skip_side_effects] = true
85:     end
86: 
87:     @options[:skip_activitypub] = true if @options[:skip_side_effects]
88: 
89:     record_severed_relationships!
90:     distribute_activities!
91:     purge_content!
92:     fulfill_deletion_request!
93:   end
94: 
95:   private
96: 
97:   def distribute_activities!
98:     return if skip_activitypub?
99: 
100:     if @account.local?
101:       delete_actor!
102:     elsif @account.activitypub?
103:       reject_follows!
104:       undo_follows!
105:     end
106:   end
107: 
108:   def reject_follows!
109:     # When deleting a remote account, the account obviously doesn't
110:     # actually become deleted on its origin server, i.e. unlike a
111:     # locally deleted account it continues to have access to its home
112:     # feed and other content. To prevent it from being able to continue
113:     # to access toots it would receive because it follows local accounts,
114:     # we have to force it to unfollow them.
115: 
116:     ActivityPub::DeliveryWorker.push_bulk(Follow.where(account: @account)) do |follow|
117:       [serialize_payload(follow, ActivityPub::RejectFollowSerializer).to_json, follow.target_account_id, @account.inbox_url]
118:     end
119:   end
120: 
121:   def undo_follows!
122:     # When deleting a remote account, the account obviously doesn't
123:     # actually become deleted on its origin server, but following relationships
124:     # are severed on our end. Therefore, make the remote server aware that the
125:     # follow relationships are severed to avoid confusion and potential issues
126:     # if the remote account gets un-suspended.
127: 
128:     ActivityPub::DeliveryWorker.push_bulk(Follow.where(target_account: @account)) do |follow|
129:       [serialize_payload(follow, ActivityPub::UndoFollowSerializer).to_json, follow.account_id, @account.inbox_url]
130:     end
131:   end
132: 
133:   def purge_user!
134:     return if !@account.local? || @account.user.nil?
135: 
136:     if keep_user_record?
137:       @account.user.disable!
138:       @account.user.invites.where(uses: 0).destroy_all
139:     else
140:       @account.user.destroy
141:     end
142:   end
143: 
144:   def purge_content!
145:     purge_user!
146:     purge_profile!
147:     purge_statuses!
148:     purge_mentions!
149:     purge_media_attachments!
150:     purge_polls!
151:     purge_generated_notifications!
152:     purge_favourites!
153:     purge_bookmarks!
154:     purge_feeds!
155:     purge_other_associations!
156: 
157:     @account.destroy unless keep_account_record?
158:   end
159: 
160:   def purge_statuses!
161:     @account.statuses.reorder(nil).where.not(id: reported_status_ids).in_batches do |statuses|
162:       BatchedRemoveStatusService.new.call(statuses, skip_side_effects: skip_side_effects?)
163:     end
164:   end
165: 
166:   def purge_mentions!
167:     @account.mentions.reorder(nil).where.not(status_id: reported_status_ids).in_batches.delete_all
168:   end
169: 
170:   def purge_media_attachments!
171:     @account.media_attachments.find_each do |media_attachment|
172:       next if keep_account_record? && reported_status_ids.include?(media_attachment.status_id)
173: 
174:       media_attachment.destroy
175:     end
176:   end
177: 
178:   def purge_polls!
179:     @account.polls.reorder(nil).where.not(status_id: reported_status_ids).in_batches.delete_all
180:   end
181: 
182:   def purge_generated_notifications!
183:     # By deleting polls and statuses without callbacks, we've left behind
184:     # polymorphically associated notifications generated by this account
185: 
186:     Notification.where(from_account: @account).in_batches.delete_all
187:     NotificationRequest.where(from_account: @account).in_batches.delete_all
188:   end
189: 
190:   def purge_favourites!
191:     @account.favourites.in_batches do |favourites|
192:       ids = favourites.pluck(:status_id)
193:       StatusStat.where(status_id: ids).update_all('favourites_count = GREATEST(0, favourites_count - 1)')
194:       Chewy.strategy.current.update(StatusesIndex, ids) if Chewy.enabled?
195:       Rails.cache.delete_multi(ids.map { |id| "statuses/#{id}" })
196:       favourites.delete_all
197:     end
198:   end
199: 
200:   def purge_bookmarks!
201:     @account.bookmarks.in_batches do |bookmarks|
202:       Chewy.strategy.current.update(StatusesIndex, bookmarks.pluck(:status_id)) if Chewy.enabled?
203:       bookmarks.delete_all
204:     end
205:   end
206: 
207:   def purge_other_associations!
208:     associations_for_destruction.each do |association_name|
209:       purge_association(association_name)
210:     end
211:   end
212: 
213:   def purge_feeds!
214:     return unless @account.local?
215: 
216:     FeedManager.instance.clean_feeds!(:home, [@account.id])
217:     FeedManager.instance.clean_feeds!(:list, @account.owned_lists.pluck(:id))
218:   end
219: 
220:   def purge_profile!
221:     # If the account is going to be destroyed
222:     # there is no point wasting time updating
223:     # its values first
224: 
225:     return unless keep_account_record?
226: 
227:     @account.silenced_at         = nil
228:     @account.suspended_at        = @options[:suspended_at] || Time.now.utc
229:     @account.suspension_origin   = :local
230:     @account.locked              = false
231:     @account.memorial            = false
232:     @account.discoverable        = false
233:     @account.trendable           = false
234:     @account.display_name        = ''
235:     @account.note                = ''
236:     @account.fields              = []
237:     @account.statuses_count      = 0
238:     @account.followers_count     = 0
239:     @account.following_count     = 0
240:     @account.moved_to_account    = nil
241:     @account.reviewed_at         = nil
242:     @account.requested_review_at = nil
243:     @account.also_known_as       = []
244:     @account.avatar.destroy
245:     @account.header.destroy
246:     @account.save!
247:   end
248: 
249:   def fulfill_deletion_request!
250:     @account.deletion_request&.destroy
251:   end
252: 
253:   def purge_association(association_name)
254:     association = @account.public_send(association_name)
255: 
256:     if ASSOCIATIONS_WITHOUT_SIDE_EFFECTS.include?(association_name)
257:       association.in_batches.delete_all
258:     else
259:       association.in_batches.destroy_all
260:     end
261:   end
262: 
263:   def delete_actor!
264:     ActivityPub::DeliveryWorker.push_bulk(delivery_inboxes, limit: 1_000) do |inbox_url|
265:       [delete_actor_json, @account.id, inbox_url]
266:     end
267: 
268:     ActivityPub::LowPriorityDeliveryWorker.push_bulk(low_priority_delivery_inboxes, limit: 1_000) do |inbox_url|
269:       [delete_actor_json, @account.id, inbox_url]
270:     end
271:   end
272: 
273:   def record_severed_relationships!
274:     return if relationship_severance_event.nil?
275: 
276:     @account.active_relationships.in_batches do |follows|
277:       # NOTE: these follows are passive with regards to the local accounts
278:       relationship_severance_event.import_from_passive_follows!(follows)
279:     end
280: 
281:     @account.passive_relationships.in_batches do |follows|
282:       # NOTE: these follows are active with regards to the local accounts
283:       relationship_severance_event.import_from_active_follows!(follows)
284:     end
285:   end
286: 
287:   def delete_actor_json
288:     @delete_actor_json ||= serialize_payload(@account, ActivityPub::DeleteActorSerializer, signer: @account, always_sign: true).to_json
289:   end
290: 
291:   def delivery_inboxes
292:     @delivery_inboxes ||= @account.followers.inboxes + Relay.enabled.pluck(:inbox_url)
293:   end
294: 
295:   def low_priority_delivery_inboxes
296:     Account.inboxes - delivery_inboxes
297:   end
298: 
299:   def reported_status_ids
300:     @reported_status_ids ||= @account.targeted_reports.unresolved.pluck(:status_ids).flatten.uniq
301:   end

304:     if keep_account_record?
305:       ASSOCIATIONS_ON_SUSPEND
306:     else
307:       ASSOCIATIONS_ON_SUSPEND + ASSOCIATIONS_ON_DESTROY
308:     end
309:   end

1: # frozen_string_literal: true

3: # == Schema Information
4: #
5: # Table name: reports
6: #
7: #  id                         :bigint(8)        not null, primary key
8: #  action_taken_at            :datetime
9: #  category                   :integer          default("other"), not null
10: #  comment                    :text             default(""), not null
11: #  forwarded                  :boolean
12: #  rule_ids                   :bigint(8)        is an Array
13: #  status_ids                 :bigint(8)        default([]), not null, is an Array
14: #  uri                        :string
15: #  created_at                 :datetime         not null
16: #  updated_at                 :datetime         not null
17: #  account_id                 :bigint(8)        not null
18: #  action_taken_by_account_id :bigint(8)
19: #  application_id             :bigint(8)
20: #  assigned_account_id        :bigint(8)
21: #  target_account_id          :bigint(8)        not null
22: #
23: 
24: class Report < ApplicationRecord
25:   include Paginable
26:   include RateLimitable
27: 
28:   COMMENT_SIZE_LIMIT = 1_000
29: 
30:   rate_limit by: :account, family: :reports
31: 
32:   belongs_to :account
33:   belongs_to :application, class_name: 'Doorkeeper::Application', optional: true
34: 
35:   with_options class_name: 'Account' do
36:     belongs_to :target_account
37:     belongs_to :action_taken_by_account, optional: true
38:     belongs_to :assigned_account, optional: true
39:   end
40: 
41:   has_many :collection_reports, dependent: :delete_all
42:   has_many :collections, through: :collection_reports
43:   has_many :notes, class_name: 'ReportNote', inverse_of: :report, dependent: :destroy
44:   has_many :notifications, as: :activity, dependent: :destroy
45: 
46:   scope :unresolved, -> { where(action_taken_at: nil) }
47:   scope :resolved,   -> { where.not(action_taken_at: nil) }
48:   scope :with_accounts, -> { includes([:account, :target_account, :action_taken_by_account, :assigned_account].index_with([:account_stat, { user: [:invite_request, :invite, :ips] }])) }
49: 
50:   # A report is considered local if the reporter is local
51:   delegate :local?, to: :account
52: 
53:   validates :comment, length: { maximum: COMMENT_SIZE_LIMIT }, if: :local?
54:   validates :rule_ids, absence: true, if: -> { (category_changed? || rule_ids_changed?) && !violation? }
55: 
56:   validate :validate_rule_ids, if: -> { (category_changed? || rule_ids_changed?) && violation? }
57: 
58:   # entries here need to be kept in sync with the front-end:
59:   # - app/javascript/mastodon/features/notifications/components/report.jsx
60:   # - app/javascript/mastodon/features/report/category.jsx
61:   # - app/javascript/mastodon/components/admin/ReportReasonSelector.jsx
62:   enum :category, {
63:     other: 0,
64:     spam: 1_000,
65:     legal: 1_500,
66:     violation: 2_000,
67:   }
68: 
69:   before_validation :set_uri, on: :create
70: 
71:   after_create_commit :trigger_create_webhooks
72:   after_update_commit :trigger_update_webhooks
73: 
74:   def object_type
75:     :flag
76:   end
77: 
78:   def statuses
79:     Status.with_discarded.where(id: status_ids)
80:   end
81: 
82:   def media_attachments_count
83:     statuses_to_query = []
84:     count = 0
85: 
86:     statuses.pluck(:id, :ordered_media_attachment_ids).each do |id, ordered_ids|
87:       if ordered_ids.nil?
88:         statuses_to_query << id
89:       else
90:         count += ordered_ids.size
91:       end
92:     end
93: 
94:     count += MediaAttachment.where(status_id: statuses_to_query).count unless statuses_to_query.empty?
95:     count
96:   end
97: 
98:   def rules
99:     Rule.with_discarded.where(id: rule_ids)
100:   end
101: 
102:   def assign_to_self!(current_account)
103:     update!(assigned_account_id: current_account.id)
104:   end
105: 
106:   def unassign!
107:     update!(assigned_account_id: nil)
108:   end
109: 
110:   def resolve!(acting_account)
111:     update!(action_taken_at: Time.now.utc, action_taken_by_account_id: acting_account.id)
112:   end
113: 
114:   def unresolve!
115:     update!(action_taken_at: nil, action_taken_by_account_id: nil)
116:   end
117: 
118:   def action_taken?
119:     action_taken_at.present?
120:   end
121: 
122:   alias action_taken action_taken?
123: 
124:   def unresolved?
125:     !action_taken?
126:   end
127: 
128:   def unresolved_siblings?
129:     Report.where.not(id: id).where(target_account_id: target_account_id).unresolved.exists?
130:   end
131: 
132:   def to_log_human_identifier
133:     id
134:   end
135: 
136:   def history
137:     subquery = [
138:       Admin::ActionLog.where(
139:         target_type: 'Report',
140:         target_id: id
141:       ).arel,
142: 
143:       Admin::ActionLog.where(
144:         target_type: 'Account',
145:         target_id: target_account_id
146:       ).arel,
147: 
148:       Admin::ActionLog.where(
149:         target_type: 'Status',
150:         target_id: status_ids
151:       ).arel,
152: 
153:       Admin::ActionLog.where(
154:         target_type: 'AccountWarning',
155:         target_id: AccountWarning.where(report_id: id).select(:id)
156:       ).arel,
157:     ].reduce { |union, query| Arel::Nodes::UnionAll.new(union, query) }
158: 
159:     Admin::ActionLog.latest.from(Arel::Nodes::As.new(subquery, Admin::ActionLog.arel_table))
160:   end
161: 
162:   private
163: 
164:   def set_uri
165:     self.uri = ActivityPub::TagManager.instance.generate_uri_for(self) if uri.nil? && account.local?
166:   end
167: 
168:   def validate_rule_ids
169:     errors.add(:rule_ids, I18n.t('reports.errors.invalid_rules')) unless rules.size == rule_ids&.size
170:   end
171: 
172:   def trigger_create_webhooks
173:     TriggerWebhookWorker.perform_async('report.created', 'Report', id)
174:   end
175: 
176:   def trigger_update_webhooks
177:     TriggerWebhookWorker.perform_async('report.updated', 'Report', id)
178:   end
179: end

1: # frozen_string_literal: true
2: 
3: # == Schema Information
4: #
5: # Table name: fasp_backfill_requests
6: #
7: #  id               :bigint(8)        not null, primary key
8: #  category         :string           not null
9: #  cursor           :string
10: #  fulfilled        :boolean          default(FALSE), not null
11: #  max_count        :integer          default(100), not null
12: #  created_at       :datetime         not null
13: #  updated_at       :datetime         not null
14: #  fasp_provider_id :bigint(8)        not null
15: #
16: class Fasp::BackfillRequest < ApplicationRecord
17:   belongs_to :fasp_provider, class_name: 'Fasp::Provider'
18: 
19:   validates :category, presence: true, inclusion: Fasp::DATA_CATEGORIES
20:   validates :max_count, presence: true,
21:                         numericality: { only_integer: true }
22: 
23:   after_commit :queue_fulfillment_job, on: :create
24: 
25:   def next_objects
26:     @next_objects ||= base_scope.to_a
27:   end
28: 
29:   def next_uris
30:     next_objects.map { |o| ActivityPub::TagManager.instance.uri_for(o) }
31:   end
32: 
33:   def more_objects_available?
34:     return false if next_objects.empty?
35: 
36:     base_scope.where(id: ...(next_objects.last.id)).any?
37:   end
38: 
39:   def advance!
40:     if more_objects_available?
41:       update!(cursor: next_objects.last.id)
42:     else
43:       update!(fulfilled: true)
44:     end
45:   end
46: 
47:   private
48: 
49:   def base_scope
50:     result = category_scope.limit(max_count).order(id: :desc)
51:     result = result.where(id: ...cursor) if cursor.present?
52:     result
53:   end
54: 
55:   def category_scope
56:     case category
57:     when 'account'
58:       Account.discoverable.without_instance_actor
59:     when 'content'
60:       Status.indexable
61:     end
62:   end
63: 
64:   def queue_fulfillment_job
65:     Fasp::BackfillWorker.perform_async(id)
66:   end
67: end
